records.question: Which feature types include the Swimming Pool feature description exactly?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_feature_types.feature_type_code FROM ref_feature_types
JOIN other_available_features ON ref_feature_types.feature_type_code = other_available_features.feature_type_code
WHERE other_available_features.feature_description = 'Swimming Pool.'
records.pred_sql: select ref_feature_types.feature_type_code from ref_feature_types join other_available_features on ref_feature_types.feature_type_code = other_available_features.feature_type_code where lower(other_available_features.feature_name) = 'swimming pool' limit 5;
records.thought: To find feature types that include the exact feature description 'Swimming Pool', join Other_Available_Features with Ref_Feature_Types and filter by feature_name = 'Swimming Pool'.
